name: drawio-skill
description: Generate draw.io (.drawio) diagrams — flowcharts, architecture, ERD, UML/sequence/class, network topology, ML/DL model figures, mind maps — and export PNG/SVG/PDF/JPG via the native draw.io desktop CLI. Rich shape vocabulary, style presets, Graphviz autolayout, import-graph extraction for Python/JS/Go/Rust.
